name: checkout
context: Build hosted checkout sessions for one-time and recurring payments
info: Stripe Checkout provides a hosted payment page that handles UI, validation, SCA/3DS, and localization. A Checkout Session is created server-side with line items, mode (payment, subscription, or setup), and redirect URLs. Stripe hosts the entire payment flow — no custom payment forms needed. This skill covers creating sessions for one-time payments and subscriptions, configuring line items with prices or ad-hoc amounts, adding custom fields, and handling post-payment fulfillment via success URLs and webhooks.
triggers: build a payment page with stripe

sections.title: Create checkout session
sections.body: Call `stripe.checkout.sessions.create()` with `mode` (`payment`, `subscription`, or `setup`), `line_items`, `success_url`, and `cancel_url`. The response includes `id`, `url`, and `status`. Redirect the customer to `session.url`. For subscriptions, Stripe automatically creates a customer and subscription object. Use `{CHECKOUT_SESSION_ID}` placeholder in URLs for session retrieval.

sections.title: Line items configuration
sections.body: Line items accept either a `price` ID (from [[stripe/subscriptions#prices-products]]) or inline `price_data` with `currency`, `unit_amount`, and `product_data`. Set `quantity` or enable `adjustable_quantity` for customer control. Multiple line items create an itemized checkout page. Images in `product_data.images` display on the checkout page.

sections.title: Custom fields
sections.body: Add `custom_fields` to collect extra information (text, dropdown, numeric). Each field has a `key`, `label`, `type`, and `optional` flag. Retrieve submitted values from the completed session's `custom_fields` array. Useful for personalization (engraving, notes) and compliance (tax IDs, company names).

sections.title: Post-payment fulfillment
sections.body: Use webhooks (recommended) or success URL retrieval for fulfillment. Listen for `checkout.session.completed` via [[stripe/webhooks]] — this fires when payment succeeds. Retrieve the session with `expand: ['line_items']` to get order details. For subscriptions, also listen for `customer.subscription.created`. Never rely solely on the success URL redirect — customers may not reach it.

scripts.name: Create Checkout Session
scripts.description: Create a Stripe Checkout session with line items and redirect URLs

STRIPE_SECRET_KEY.description: Stripe secret API key (sk_test_... or sk_live_...)

lineItems.description: Array of line item objects with price or price_data and quantity

successUrl.description: URL to redirect after successful payment

cancelUrl.description: URL to redirect if customer cancels

url.description: Hosted checkout page URL to redirect the customer to

depends.reason: Requires a Stripe account and API key

author: dojo-community
